heading: Prohibition on use of funds for publicity or propaganda purposes within the United States
label: 2241a Prohibition on use of funds for publicity or propaganda purposes within the United States
text: Funds available to the Department of Defense may not be obligated or expended for publicity or propaganda purposes within the United States not otherwise specifically authorized by law.
